sourceAuthorityBoundary: This registry is execution metadata for configured read-model validation. Todo Search is limited graph-source-promoted, Todo App PBE Run is confirmed graph-source-backed for structure-only, and tree-native artifacts remain compatibility/fallback/reference unless a later explicit retirement decision changes that role.
nonPromotionStatement: Registry inclusion is not repo-wide Graph-source promotion, tree-native retirement, CI enforcement, required-check configuration, or user acceptance.
mutationBoundary: Future parsers may read and normalize this registry, but validation commands must not silently mutate it. Registry edits require an explicit reviewed config update.

retainedWarnings: bounded fixture Evidence is not a full Todo application implementation
partial UI screenshot/manual visual Evidence remains partial
ACEP task-card public-doc cleanup remains deferred

boundaryStatements.sourceAuthorityBoundary: Todo Search registry inclusion reflects the limited graph-source-promoted selected-slice source role; tree-native selected-slice artifacts remain maintained compatibility/fallback/reference records.
boundaryStatements.nonPromotionStatement: This profile does not approve repo-wide Graph-source promotion, tree-native retirement, CI enforcement, or required-check configuration.
boundaryStatements.userAcceptanceBoundary: Validation, parity, CI Evidence, aggregate status, and registry inclusion do not replace user acceptance authority.

runtimeFixtureRequirement.note: Runtime fixture Evidence is attached-evidence-only if added later; it is not required for structure-only validation.

retainedWarnings: structure-only profile has no manual parity artifact
structure-only profile has no scoped pilot marker
structure-only output is not source-authority bearing

boundaryStatements.sourceAuthorityBoundary: Todo App PBE Run registry inclusion reflects confirmed graph-source-backed generation for structure-only only; canonical .pbe artifacts remain compatibility/fallback/reference records.
boundaryStatements.nonPromotionStatement: This profile does not promote Todo App PBE Run beyond structure-only, add parity backing, add pilot-marker backing, retire tree-native artifacts, or create CI enforcement.
boundaryStatements.userAcceptanceBoundary: Validation, aggregate status, CI Evidence, and registry inclusion do not replace user acceptance authority.
